protein_name: Calcium/calmodulin-dependent protein kinase belonging to a proposed calcium-triggered signaling cascade. In vitro phosphorylates CREB1 and SYN1/synapsin I. Phosphorylates and activates CAMK1. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. CAMK Ser/Thr protein kinase family. CaMK subfamily. 5 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
